title: Head-down Display
description: Automatically hides the Head-up Display when not in use.
body:
![Requires Fabric](https://i.imgur.com/1WhuY6q.png "Requires Fabric")
![Requires Fabric API](https://i.imgur.com/VniXNq0.png "Requires Fabric API")

# Head-down Display

Automatically hides the Head-up Display when not in use.  
Cache automatiquement l'affichage tête haute quand inutilisé.

![Demonstration](https://i.imgur.com/gMcvcrz.gif "Demonstration")

![Config](https://i.imgur.com/bnw7KnI.png "Config")

## Dependencies

This mod does not Jar-in-Jar it's dependencies--it will use the dependencies if present, but will function without them. The dependencies are solely to allow configuration.

## Credits

Thank you strojae for the French translation.  
Merci strojae pour la mauvais traduction en francais.
